originalTask: Build Architecture 1 — Transcribe + Custom Vocabulary + Chart Agent. A medical spa POC where a provider taps Start Session, streams audio via WebSocket to Amazon Transcribe Streaming with Custom Vocabulary, sees live transcription, then on End Session the transcript goes to Bedrock Claude to extract structured chart fields into a JSON template. Charts and transcripts stored in DynamoDB/S3. Demo UI required.

subtasks.title: Terraform foundation: S3, DynamoDB, Cognito, IAM
subtasks.description: Set up core AWS infrastructure with Terraform. Create: (1) S3 bucket for transcript/audio storage with SSE, (2) DynamoDB table for chart records (partition key: sessionId), (3) Cognito Identity Pool (unauthenticated access enabled for POC) that grants temporary AWS credentials scoped to transcribe:StartStreamTranscriptionWebSocket only, (4) IAM roles for Lambda functions with least-privilege for Bedrock, S3, DynamoDB, API Gateway. The Cognito unauth role is the key change — it lets the browser call Transcribe Streaming directly, avoiding the API Gateway WebSocket 29s Lambda timeout.
verificationCriteria: terraform apply succeeds with no errors
S3 bucket exists and has encryption enabled
DynamoDB table exists with correct key schema
Cognito Identity Pool exists and returns temporary credentials
Unauth IAM role has transcribe:StartStreamTranscriptionWebSocket permission
Lambda IAM roles exist with correct policy attachments

subtasks.title: Custom Vocabulary for Amazon Transcribe
subtasks.description: Create an Amazon Transcribe Custom Vocabulary with medical spa terminology via Terraform or AWS CLI. Terms: Botox, Dysport, Juvederm, Restylane, microneedling, dermaplaning, chemical peel, IPL, laser resurfacing, hyaluronic acid, platelet-rich plasma, PRP, subcutaneous, intramuscular, erythema, edema, contraindication, glabella, nasolabial, mentalis, orbicularis, corrugator, procerus, frontalis, masseter, CoolSculpting, PDO threads, neuromodulator, dermal filler. Vocabulary must reach READY state.
verificationCriteria: Custom Vocabulary exists in Transcribe
Vocabulary status is READY
aws transcribe get-vocabulary returns correct name and READY status

subtasks.title: Chart extraction Lambda + REST API (Bedrock Claude)
subtasks.description: Build a Lambda function behind API Gateway REST endpoint POST /extract-chart. Input: full transcript text + chart template type. The Lambda sends the transcript to Bedrock Claude (claude-3-haiku or sonnet) with a structured prompt to extract fields into the Neuromodulator Treatment Form JSON template. Returns filled chart JSON. Saves extracted chart to DynamoDB (sessionId key) and raw transcript to S3. The prompt instructs Claude to fill only fields evidenced in the transcript, leave others empty. Include the Neuromodulator chart template as a JSON file in the Lambda package.
verificationCriteria: POST /extract-chart with sample transcript returns valid chart JSON
Returned JSON matches Neuromodulator template schema
Fields correctly extracted (treatment, products, areas, dosage)
Unknown fields returned as empty, not hallucinated
Chart saved to DynamoDB, transcript saved to S3
Lambda logs show successful Bedrock invocation

subtasks.title: Chart CRUD REST API (retrieve, update, list)
subtasks.description: Add REST API Gateway endpoints on the same API from subtask 3: (1) GET /charts/{sessionId} — retrieve chart from DynamoDB, (2) PUT /charts/{sessionId} — update chart after provider review, (3) GET /charts — list recent charts. Enable CORS on all endpoints for browser access.
verificationCriteria: GET /charts/{sessionId} returns correct chart for known session
PUT /charts/{sessionId} persists updates
GET /charts returns list of recent charts
404 for unknown sessionId
CORS headers present in responses

subtasks.title: Demo UI: live transcription + chart auto-fill interface
subtasks.description: Build a single HTML page hosted on S3+CloudFront. The browser uses AWS SDK for JS v3 to: (1) get temp credentials from Cognito Identity Pool, (2) open a WebSocket directly to Amazon Transcribe Streaming with Custom Vocabulary — no Lambda in the audio path, (3) capture mic audio via MediaRecorder/AudioWorklet and stream PCM to Transcribe, (4) display live transcript fragments on the left panel. On End Session: (5) POST full transcript to /extract-chart, (6) display auto-filled chart fields in an editable form on the right panel, (7) Save button calls PUT /charts/{sessionId}, (8) session history via GET /charts. Include a sample dictation script on the page. Must work in Chrome. Include DEMO-GUIDE.md with step-by-step instructions for a non-technical person.
verificationCriteria: CloudFront URL loads demo page with 200
Start Session activates mic and connects to Transcribe Streaming
Live transcript appears on screen while speaking
Medical spa terms transcribed correctly (Botox not 'boat ox')
End Session triggers chart extraction, fields auto-populate
Chart fields are editable, Save persists changes
Session history shows saved charts
Sample dictation script visible on page
DEMO-GUIDE.md exists with clear step-by-step instructions
Works in Chrome without console errors
